0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Cross-Provider Migration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Move your memories out of other providers and into Mnemosyne with a single command."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v2.3 ships importers for 6 major memory providers. Each importer handles extraction, field mapping, and data import end to end. You don't need to write export scripts or manually map fields."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Supported Providers"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Provider"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Import Via"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"CLI Flag"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mem0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SDK or REST API"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Letta"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["SDK, ",["$","code",null,{"children":".af"}]," file, or REST"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from letta --agent-file-path sk-xxx"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cognee"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SDK (Kuzu graph model)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from honcho"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"SuperMemory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"REST API"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from supermemory --api-key sk-xxx"}]}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For providers that do not expose a clean API, there is an agentic fallback. Mnemosyne generates the exact migration script or AI agent prompt you need."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Start"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Import from Mem0\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx\n\n# Dry run first (validate but don't write)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx --dry-run\n\n# Import from a JSON export file\nhermes mnemosyne import --file ./export.json\n\n# List all supported providers\nhermes mnemosyne import --list-providers\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Every importer follows the same pipeline:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extract"}]," — Pull all memories from the source provider (SDK, REST API, or file)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Validate"}]," — Check that extracted data has the required fields"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transform"}]," — Map provider-specific fields to Mnemosyne's format"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Import"}]," — Write into working memory with identity metadata preserved"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"All metadata, timestamps, user/agent identity, and original IDs are preserved in the import."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Preservation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Imported memories keep their original author identity:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mem0"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent_id"}]," become ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Letta"}],": agent identity from ",["$","code",null,{"children":".af"}]," metadata"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Zep"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]," from session owner"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cognee"}],": node labels and relationships map to triples"]}],"\n"]}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9"],["$La"],"$Lb"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"xV3gA_0_YoAqEIOnSQ2ns"}
3:["$","p",null,{"children":"You can override the session or assign everything to a channel:"}]
4:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"hermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx \\\n  --channel-id my-team-channel\n"}]}]
5:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Agentic Fallback"}]
6:["$","p",null,{"children":"For providers without a clean API, or when you cannot install the source SDK:"}]
7:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Generate a migration script\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --generate-script\n\n# Generate AI agent instructions (give these to your AI)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --agentic\n\n# Generate documentation for writing your own importer\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --generate-docs\n"}]}]
